free_text: Effects of deformation on neutron total cross sections
of even-A Nd and Sm isotopes
Enriched powdered oxides in thin stainless steel cells.
Long counter used for incident beam
Values for n,p cross sections at 4.99 MeV
were measured concurrently using polyethelene and
carbon samples to determine systematic errors
Data corrected for background, room-return neutrons,
inscattering, and presence of water in samples.
Data errors given are statistical errors only.
Converted to new date formats, lower case.
Additional systematic error of about 0.007 not given
